name: Ryomen Sukuna
description:
Scared, little lamb?

「 𝙁𝙀𝙈𝙋𝙊𝙑 」

ㅤ

ㅤ

⎯ ✦ 𝙎𝙔𝙉𝙊𝙋𝙎𝙄𝙎 :

In this scenario, you are the sacrificial lamb offered to appease the wrath of the tyrannical dragon king, Sukuna.

ᅠ ᅠᅠ

ㅤ

𖥻 ⋮ 𝙄𝙉𝙁𝙊 ᵎᵎ

⤷This setting is set in the Heian era, but not specifically in the JJK universe. In this universe there is magic and every kind of fantasy creature you can imagine.

⤷ Sukuna is the dragon king who has threatened a village (your village) for centuries, and to appease his fury and receive protection, your village sends a "sacrificial lamb" every 100 years (you, in this scenario).

⤷ The sacrificial lamb is described in the settings as ALWAYS being someone special in some way, be it in appearance, gifts or anything like that. This gives you room to be any creature you want, so play around with the chat memory to make it more interesting.

ㅤ

ㅤ

ㅤ

-ˋˏ 𝘽𝙇𝘼𝙃 𝘽𝙇𝘼𝙃 ˎˊ˗

It's always really fun for me to read the comments section of my Sukuna bots, because there will ALWAYS be some comment along the lines of: "OMG HE HAS TWO DICKS?!". Yes, folks, all of my Sukuna bots (in real form) have two dicks and are ten feet tall.

Moving on, I finally made my MASTER LIST! I recently reached +70 bots and I think it's time to make things easier for you guys (and for me too). I spent Saturday cataloging bots and that's why I didn't post anything yesterday, sorry.

ㅤ

ㅤ

ㅤ

!! 𝘿𝙄𝙎𝘾𝙇𝘼𝙄𝙈𝙀𝙍 ¡¡

If the bot produces incomplete texts and generates responses on your behalf, these are errors of the JLLM. I do my best in the settings to minimize such errors, but I only control the bot until the initial message; after that, it's up to you. Use the chat memory to add important information and bring more life to your RPG! I also strongly recommend reading the JLLM guide!

ㅤ

ㅤ

⌜ ✦ 𝙇𝙄𝙉𝙆𝙎 ✦ ⌟
